{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201620374510B33EB5638F4256E1\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353430792842298163","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"它是中国通史的权威著作，我从中学到了很多。这让我想起了钱穆先生的《国史大纲》，它们都是了解中国历史的佳作。读这本书，就像和一位智慧的长者聊天，受益匪浅。","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":45,"text":"中国历史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739948388F4256E1%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353430792842298163%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227311625189270228002%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708234425,"group_id":"7311625189270228002","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzZNVSn0PH+voIEnK6A4NSc9K6DY9KY1Mr8tNHdruSaC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3969709778948746","user_name":"喜欢解放吉他的孙先生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3969709778948746","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7311625189270228002","book_info":{"abstract":"《中国通史》全名《自修适用白话国本史》，是我国历史上第一部用白话文写成的、系统的新式中国通史，也是吕思勉先生的史学成名作及代表作，从民国至今日始终不断再版，畅销不衰，是各年龄阶层系统了解中国历史的简明、权威著作。全书上起远古时代，下至作者写作之年（1922年），是本名副其实的中国通史。尤值一提的是，本书系吕思勉先生有感于自己“少年时，因没有名师指导，精力、时间浪费甚多，因未得门径，绕掉的圈儿也属不少”，才专为青年学生写了这部“自修适用”的历史入门书。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/831856447a882e8034bc1ff7be69f5ab~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吕思勉","author_id":"","book_id":"7311625189270228002","book_name":"中国通史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c890","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402\u0026name=中国历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7311626812201634878","read_count":"368","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"366648"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"60","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/831856447a882e8034bc1ff7be69f5ab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779178838\u0026x-signature=9sSRrpNOGFEmo5qbU%2Fclh2v4q8U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201620374510B33EB5638F4256E1\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18480,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1255},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7543804663532258072","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"观点犀利，有理有据"},"content_
